"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\axiom_simulator.dir/objects.a
C:\mingw-w64\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\axiom_simulator.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\axiom_simulator.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\mingw-w64\mingw64\bin\c++.exe -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\axiom_simulator.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o axiom_simulator.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libaxiom_simulator.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\axiom_simulator.dir\linkLibs.rsp
